rules.text: Do not render eyes or facial features.
rules.appliesWhen: creatures, characters, or anything with a face

rules.text: Render glass/windows as solid blue, never transparent.
rules.appliesWhen: vehicles, buildings, or anything with glass or windows

rules.text: Use flat, solid colours with no gradients, smooth shading, or photographic texture detail.
Favour a bold, simplified silhouette built from large, clearly separated forms; avoid fine filigree and busy, fragmented outlines.

This will be rendered as a low-resolution voxel model. Describe only features and colour regions that stay legible when the whole model is the chosen resolution voxels along its longest axis: every distinct colour patch and protruding feature should occupy at least ~2 voxels. Omit fine surface texture, thin lines, small multi-colour patterns, and gradients.
